landing.title: social-media-v1
landing.subtitle: AI operating system for social networks

loginMfa.title: Two-factor authentication
loginMfa.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app or one of your recovery codes.

register.title: Sign up
register.tosAccept: I accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it below.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: If this email is registered, we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.submitted: If the email exists, a message has been sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.description: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successDescription: All active sessions have been ended. Sign in with your new password.

errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists
errors.TOS_NOT_ACCEPTED: You must accept the Terms of Service
errors.LOGIN_LOCKED: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_REPLAYED: Session ended for security reasons. Sign in again.
errors.VERIFY_RESEND_COOLDOWN: Wait a moment and try again
errors.NO_ACTIVE_VERIFICATION: Request a fresh code — the previous one is no longer valid
errors.VERIFY_CODE_EXPIRED: Code expired. Request a new one.
errors.VERIFY_TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
errors.MFA_ENROLLMENT_NOT_STARTED: Start enrollment again — the previous request expired
errors.MFA_RATE_LIMITED: Too many wrong codes. Try again later.

security.title: Security
security.disabledDescription: Turn on 2FA so that signing in requires a code from your authenticator app.
security.enabledDescription: {remaining} recovery codes remaining. Regenerate if fewer than five.
security.regenerateDescription: Generate a fresh set. The old codes will stop working.
security.disableDescription: Requires your current password and a fresh code.
security.recoveryDescription: Each code can be used once. We'll show them only once — save them somewhere safe.

dashboard.welcomeToast: Welcome, {email}! Your account has been created.

password.title: Change password
password.successHint: Password updated. All other sessions were ended.

email.title: Change email
email.codeSent: We've sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below.
email.successHint: Email updated. The next login will use the new address.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.empty: No active sessions besides this one.

wizard.title: Connect a Telegram channel
wizard.step2: Add the bot as administrator with the "Post messages" right
wizard.identifierHelpPrivate: Private groups / channels: numeric chat id starting with -100… (e.g. -1003983437401). The t.me/<title> URL won't work — it shows the title but isn't a public handle. To find the chat id, add the bot to the chat, then forward any message from the chat to @JsonDumpBot or @userinfobot — they'll reply with the numeric id.
wizard.identifierHelpInvite: Invite links (t.me/+… or t.me/joinchat/…) can't be resolved by the Bot API. Once the bot is in the chat, switch to the numeric chat id.
wizard.identifierRequired: Channel @username or chat id is required.
wizard.promotePrompt: Promote our bot to administrator in {target} with at least the "Post messages" right, then click "Verify & connect".
wizard.promotePromptWithBot: Promote {bot} to administrator in {target} with at least the "Post messages" right, then click "Verify & connect".
wizard.botHintIntro: Make this bot a channel administrator with the "Post messages" right:
wizard.botInfoError: Could not load bot info. Channel verification may still work, but the admin promotion step won't show a deep link.
